name: Xiaoyu Deng
bio_short: I am a first-year master student in Applied Psychology at South China Normal University, focusing on close-loop EEG research..
bio_long: I am a first-year master student in the School of Psychology at South China Normal University, majoring in Applied Psychology. My research focuses on close-loop EEG systems, exploring real-time brain activity monitoring and feedback mechanisms. I aim to apply these approaches to better understand neural dynamics and develop potential applications in cognitive enhancement.
